mapper.select:
select k.roleId, i.rolename as name, k.rankId, k.score, k.time, k.times, k.dayTimes, k.timesReward, k.stageReward, i.fightPower as power from peakpk k left join playerworldinfo i on k.roleId = i.roleid order by k.score desc, i.fightPower desc
limit #{size}
mapper.insert: insert into peakpk (roleId, rankId, score, `time`, times, dayTimes, timesReward, stageReward) value ( #{roleId}, #{rankId}, #{score}, #{time}, #{times}, #{dayTimes}, #{timesReward}, #{stageReward}) on duplicate key update rankId = #{rankId}, score = #{score}, `time` = #{time}, times = #{times}, dayTimes = #{dayTimes}, timesReward = #{timesReward}, stageReward = #{stageReward}
